name: twitter-video-downloader
title: X/Twitter Video Downloader
description: Download videos from X/Twitter with ease
author: kaanrkaraman

commands.name: index
commands.title: Download Video
commands.subtitle: X/Twitter
commands.description: Paste an X/Twitter status URL and save its video locally.

commands.name: download-from-clipboard
commands.title: Download Video from Clipboard
commands.subtitle: X/Twitter
commands.description: Read an X/Twitter status URL from the clipboard and download its video without opening a form.

preferences.name: downloadFolder
preferences.title: Download Folder
preferences.description: Folder where videos are saved. Defaults to ~/Downloads when empty.

preferences.name: filenameTemplate
preferences.title: Filename Template
preferences.description: Placeholders: {username}, {tweetId}, {index}, {date}. The .mp4 extension is appended automatically.

preferences.name: downloadAllMedia
preferences.title: Multi-Video Tweets
preferences.label: Download every video when a tweet has multiple
preferences.description: When a tweet contains more than one video or GIF, save all of them instead of only the first.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
